name: German Noodle Ring with Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the noodles in salted water and cook for about 10 minutes until tender.
2. Drain and transfer to a well-greased ring mold.
3. Melt butter, add flour, and blend. Stir in milk and continue cooking, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Add seasoning, cheese cut into small pieces, and cook until cheese melts. Reserve half of the sauce for later use.
5. To remaining sauce, add well-beaten eggs and mix well. Pour over noodles.
6. Place mold in pan containing hot water and bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
7. Unmold onto a large platter, pour over remaining cheese sauce, and fill the center with desired vegetables such as peas, carrots, spinach, or asparagus tips.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
